name_cn:
🆕 M82394
The "Portomone Rozari" made of Monogram Unplant leather featuring the iconic Monogram pattern embossing. A small wallet with a circular flap decorated with a printed button. Inside features a flat pocket, zip coin pocket, and 2 card slots.
Size: 11 8 2.5
